name: Easy Ratatouille
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all vegetables in a large bowl.
2. Combine marinade ingredients in a separate bowl and whisk together. Pour marinade over vegetables, tossing to coat well.
3. Place mixture in a roasting pan and roast at 425°F (220°C) for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until vegetables are browned and tender. Toss everything together to combine flavors.
4. Sprinkle with parsley before serving. Serve with a Portuguese Dao or Bairrada wine, Greek red, or an Italian Barbera wine. The classic ratatouille calls for sauteeing each vegetable individually then combining them. By roasting all the vegetables together in the oven, you have an authentic ratatouille without all the work.
